headline: CELH and Zero-Sugar Energy Trends to Watch Through 2026
summary: CELH is focusing on low- and zero-sugar energy, with its portfolio driving a large share of U.S. zero-sugar category growth in Q1 2026.

headline: Is CELH a Buy After Q1 2026 Results and Share Buybacks?
summary: CELH grew Q1 2026 revenue 138%, repurchased shares, and saw gross margin drop as its three-brand energy portfolio expanded.

headline: CELH Growth Drivers in 2026: Portfolio, Shelf Gains, and PepsiCo
summary: CELH leans on PepsiCo distribution, shelf resets, and a wider portfolio to lift CELSIUS momentum and expand Alani Nu and Rockstar.

headline: Is Celsius Holdings (CELH) One of the Oversold Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: Celsius Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CELH) is one of the oversold stocks to buy right now. On May 7, Celsius Holdings reported record Q1 2026 revenue of $783 million, marking a 138% increase year-over-year. This growth was driven by the recent acquisitions of Alani Nu and Rockstar Energy, as well as the company’s expanded integration within the […]
